testcase.name: test_matches_junk[REVIEWED BY Yashwant Bisht, Uttaranchal University, India]

skipped.message: ADR 0018 moved view='toc' off the on-demand chunk-walking renderer and onto persistent ref_segments rows populated by the segment_toc worker. The seed here doesn't run the worker, so the response is the 'segments not yet computed' placeholder. Fix in a follow-up by either running run_paper_segments_pass in the seed or rewriting the assertions against the placeholder text.
ADR 0018 — view='toc' needs ref_segments populated; see test_toc.
ADR 0018 — view='toc' needs ref_segments populated; see test_toc.

Search response renderer dropped the ``top_k=10`` widen hint when porting to the TOON-table response shape. Either re-add the hint to the new renderer or update the assertion to the current trailer vocabulary.
Same renderer change as test_singleton_hit_no_redundant_trailer — search trailer vocabulary moved off ``top_k=10`` widen hint.

testcase.name: test_metadata_titles_rejected[Cite this article: Smith et al.]
test_bare_keyword_rejected[ multiple words but no operators ]
test_abbreviation_does_not_split[Smith et al. demonstrated the effect.]
test_abbreviation_does_not_split[We used DFT (i.e. density functional theory) calculations.]
test_abbreviation_does_not_split[Compare vs. the control sample shown above.]
test_abbreviation_does_not_split[Add e.g. lithium or sodium salts to the electrolyte.]
